upasargachandrika.example_text: prahvaH praRataH
'eza prahvo'smi Bagavan ezA vijYApanA ca naH' (mahA॰ca॰1.47)
'prahvezvanirbanDaruzo hi santaH' (raGu॰16.80) prahvo viDeyo namraH
'tizWannAsInaH prahvo vA niyamo yatra nedfSaH' (go॰smf॰1.10) prahvaH=AsanAdyupASritya praRataH pravaRaH sTitaH
'prati tyaM cArumaDvaraM gopITAya pra hUyase' (f0 1191) prahUyase AkAryase nimantryase

'tizWannAsInaH prahvo vA niyamo yatra nedfSaH tadAsInena karttavyaM na prahvena na tizWatA' (go0 smf0 110).. pustake praTamArDasya nyAsaH uttarArDanyAsAya kftsnaH Sloka Avartyate vivakzitArTasya kArtsnyAya
'saMhvayasva vivakzitam' (Bawwi0 817) brUhItyAha SaNke kaverayaM svakapolakalpiterTe prayogaH
'hUtirAkAraRA''hvAnaM saMhUtirbahuBiH kftA' (amaraH)
'kaccinnAyaM vacanAtsObalasya samAhvAtA devanAyopayAtaH' (BA0 vana0 58) spazwo'rTaH
'BakzayitvA samupahUtAH smaH' (Sa0 brA0 4311) samaM nimantritAH sma ityarTaH
'yadindrAgnI janA ime vihvayante tanA girA' (f0 8407) nAnA hvayanta ityarTaH
'tAM devAsurA vyahvayanta' (tE0 saM0 1713) vyahvayanta viviDamAhvayan
'uBayatastarhi nividaM vyAhvayIta' (vyAhvayet) uccArayedityarTaH
'tAByo na vyAhvayIta' (E0 brA0 621) nAnA''hvAnaM na kuryAdityarTaH
'kaMsaScARUramAhvayate' (si0 kO0) sparDamAnastasyAhvAnaM karotItyarTaH
'Ahvata cedirARmurArim' (SiSu0 201) ukto'rTaH
'Ahvayad dvEraTena' (BA0 SAM0 51) AhUtavAnityarTaH ekEka Avayo raTamAruhya paraspara yoDayatvityAmantrayateti yAvat
'hantEnaM brahmodyamAhvayAmahA iti' (Sa0 brA0 11412) brahmaRi vAdAya tamAmantrayAmahE tadaBiBavecCayeti brAhmaRArTaH

'strIpuMDarmoM viBAgaSca dyUtamAhvaya eva ca' (manu0 87) prARidyUtamAhvayaH prARidyUtaM samAhvaya ityamare pAWaH Ahvaya Ahveti nAmaDeyaparyAyO taTA cAmaraH paWati--aTAhvayaH AKyAhve aBiDAnaM ca nAmaDeyaM ca nAma ca rAmAyaRAhvayaM kAvyam vasizWAhvo munisattamaH nagaraM gajasAhvayam (hastinApuram) gajena hastinA (hastinAmnA nfpatinA) samAna Ahvayo yasya tattaTABUtam vfdDerapyAhvayA ime (amaraH) AhvayA nAmAni paryAyAH
'pUrRa AhAvo madirasya maDvaH' (f0 101126) AhAvo nipAnam
'nipAnamAhAvaH' (pA0 3374) AhAvastu nipAnaM syAdupakUpajalASaye ityamaraH Ahavo yudDam AhvAyakA AhvAtAraH
'AhvAyakAnBUmipaterayoDyAm' (Bawwi0 243) atra BavizyadarTakena RvulA yoge zazWInizeDaSizwirnAdftA kavinA BUmipatimiti tUcitam
'AhvAyake visfzwe'pi sA'nyaTA nAgatA kaTam' (kaTA0 5888) AhvAyaka AhvAtA
'tvezaM rUpaM namasA nihvayAmahe' (f0 11145)
'indrAvato' vase ni hvaye vaH' (f0 101011)
'yadevEnAni Sasanti indramevEtE rnihvayanti' (E0 brA0 618) nihvayanti niyamenAhvayanti
'aSvinAvavase ni hvaye vAm' (tE0 saM0 2437) ukto'rTaH
'udahvamAyurAyuze kratve dakzAya jIvase' (aTarva0 18223) udahvam uccEH svareRAhvayAmi
'CAyApratyAhvayABAsA hyasanto'pyarTakAriRaH' (BA0 pu0 11285) pratyAhvayaH pratiDvaniH
'anuhavaM parihavaM parivAdaM parikzavam' (aTarva0 1984) paritaH pArSvadvaye AhvAnaM parihavaH
'taduBayato DAyyAM paryAhvayate' (E0 brA0 331) SaMsAvom (SaMsAva om ) ityeza mantraH paryAhAvaH taM paWatItyarTaH
'upAsmAn vAcaspati rhvayatAm' (aTarva0 114) upahvayatAM tatPalaprAptimaByanujAnAtu upapUrvo hvayatiraByanujYAne vartate yaTA upahUta upa hvayasva iti somaBakzaRAnujYAnamantre iti sAyaRaH
'upahUta upahavaM te' SIya' (tE0 saM0 1631) upahavo'nujYA
'anujYAsvIkArAya yatprArTanaM tad upahava ityucyate iti gfhAnupahvayAmahe' (aTarva0 7623) ityatra sAyaRaH
'nAnupahUtena somaH pAtavyaH' (kAWaka saM0 111) anupahUto'nanujYAtaH
'upahUto vAcaspatiH' (aTarva0 114) upahUtaH samIpamAhUtaH
'na BayAnna ca kArpaRyAnna loBAttvAmupAhvaye' (BA0 SAM0 15117) upAhvaye SizyaM karomi
